name: Workcell Camera Occlusion Analysis
description: A robotics engineer must evaluate line-of-sight visibility in a robot workcell. Using the ZMQ Remote API, develop a Python script to determine camera occlusion for a target inspection point at (0.5, 0.0, 0.05) across at least 8 camera positions and 15 robot joint configurations. The script should identify if the line-of-sight is occluded at each configuration. Save the raw results (camera_id, cam_x, cam_y, cam_z, config_id, is_occluded) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/occlusion_data.csv and a summary report (total_cameras_tested, total_configs_tested, target_position, best_camera_id, best_visibility_pct, worst_visibility_pct) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/occlusion_report.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
